tasks.name: Book the cheapest immediate economy taxi under $20 from home to the station
tasks.description: From the homepage, set up an immediate ride from '123 Maple Street' to 'Downtown Central Station', filter to economy rides, sort by price, and book the cheapest option with an estimated fare of $20 or less, paying in cash.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main booking form, click the pickup location field and type '123 Maple Street', then select the matching address suggestion from the dropdown list.
Click the drop-off location field, type 'Downtown Central Station', and select the matching suggestion from the dropdown list.
Click the pickup time selector and choose the earliest 'Now' or immediate option available within the next 10 minutes.
Click the 'View ride options' or similar button below the form to see available vehicles.
In the ride type filter area, select the 'Economy' category (or the lowest-priced vehicle class) so only economy rides are shown.
Open the sort dropdown above the ride list and select 'Price: Low to High'.
From the sorted list, locate and click the first ride option whose estimated fare is $20 or less.
On the passenger details page, enter the name 'Alex Green' and a phone number, select 'Cash' as the payment method, and click the 'Confirm Booking' button.

tasks.name: Schedule a sedan ride to the airport tomorrow at 8:30 AM with promo so total is under $35
tasks.description: Use the scheduling feature to book a sedan for tomorrow at 8:30 AM from '45 Oak Avenue' to 'City Airport Terminal 1'. Apply promo code 'OFFICE10' and select the cheapest sedan whose final estimated fare after discount is $35 or less.
steps: From the homepage header, click the 'Schedule Ride' or 'Later' option to open the scheduled ride booking form.
In the pickup field, type '45 Oak Avenue' and select the correct address from the suggestions list.
In the drop-off field, type 'City Airport Terminal 1' and choose the corresponding suggestion.
Click the date picker field and select tomorrow's date from the calendar.
Click the time picker field and set the pickup time to '08:30 AM'.
Click the button to view available ride options for the chosen time and route.
In the ride type filter or tabs, select 'Sedan' so only sedan-class vehicles are displayed.
Find the promo code field, type 'OFFICE10' into it, and click the 'Apply' button to update estimated fares.
Open the sort dropdown and choose 'Price: Low to High', then identify the cheapest sedan whose final estimated fare (after promo) is $35 or less and click on that option.
On the confirmation page, enter passenger name 'Jordan Lee', select 'Card' as payment method, and click 'Schedule Ride' to complete the booking.

tasks.name: Book a multi-stop trip for 3 passengers in a minivan for under $40
tasks.description: Set up a trip for 3 passengers starting at '200 Pine Street', picking up a friend at 'Lakeside Shopping Mall', and ending at 'Lakeside Park'. Filter for vehicles that seat at least 4 passengers, select a minivan option under $40, and pay by card.
steps: On the homepage booking form, click the pickup field and enter '200 Pine Street', then select the matching suggestion.
Click the drop-off field and enter 'Lakeside Park', then select the matching suggestion from the dropdown.

Click the 'Add stop' or 'Add another destination' button and in the new stop field type 'Lakeside Shopping Mall', selecting the correct suggestion so it appears between the pickup and final destination.
Locate the passenger count selector and set the number of passengers to '3'.
Click the button to view available ride options for this multi-stop route.
In the vehicle filters, select or check options that indicate 'Seats 4+ passengers' or choose the 'Minivan' / 'XL' category.
Open the sort dropdown and choose 'Price: Low to High' to order the multi-passenger options by cost.
From the displayed minivan or XL options, click on the first option with an estimated fare less than or equal to $40.
On the booking details page, enter the passenger name 'Sam Rivera', select 'Credit/Debit Card' as the payment option, fill in card details as required, and click 'Confirm Ride'.

tasks.name: Save Home and Work addresses and start a booking using the saved Work address
tasks.description: Use the profile or saved places section to create two saved addresses labeled 'Home' and 'Work', then start a new ride booking from the saved 'Work' address to 'City Library' using a standard taxi.
steps: From the top navigation, click on the profile icon or username and select 'Saved Places' or 'My Addresses' from the dropdown menu.
Click the 'Add New Address' button, type 'Home' into the label field, enter '123 Maple Street' as the address, and save the new Home address.
Click 'Add New Address' again, type 'Work' into the label field, enter '45 Oak Avenue' as the address, and save the new Work address.
Use the site logo or 'Home' link in the header to navigate back to the main homepage booking form.
Click the pickup location field and choose 'Work - 45 Oak Avenue' from the list of saved addresses that appears.
Click the drop-off location field, type 'City Library', and select the corresponding suggestion from the dropdown.
Click the button to view available ride options for this route.
In the ride type selection or tabs, choose the 'Standard' taxi category (not Economy or Premium).
On the ride options list, click the first standard taxi option shown and then on the next page enter a name and phone number before clicking 'Confirm Booking'.

tasks.name: Book the highest-rated wheelchair-accessible ride under $30 for this afternoon
tasks.description: Set up a ride for this afternoon from 'Sunny Care Clinic' to 'Greenwood Community Center', filter to wheelchair-accessible vehicles, sort by rating, and select the highest-rated option with an estimated fare under $30.
steps: On the homepage, click the pickup field and type 'Sunny Care Clinic', then select the correct suggestion.
Click the drop-off field, type 'Greenwood Community Center', and choose the matching suggestion.
Open the date/time selector, keep today's date, and set the pickup time to a specific afternoon time, such as '03:00 PM'.
Click the button to show ride options for the selected time and locations.
In the filter panel, open the 'Accessibility' or 'Special requirements' filter and select the 'Wheelchair accessible' checkbox so only accessible vehicles are displayed.
Open the sort dropdown above the list and choose 'Rating: High to Low'.
From the sorted accessible ride options, identify the first one with an estimated fare of $30 or less and click that ride option.
On the ride confirmation page, enter the passenger name 'Taylor Morgan', leave payment as the default method (or choose 'Cash' if required), and click 'Confirm Ride'.

tasks.name: Modify an upcoming airport ride to change the pickup time and upgrade the car class
tasks.description: Find an existing upcoming booking in 'My Trips' for a ride to the airport, reschedule its pickup time from 9:00 AM to 8:45 AM, and upgrade the vehicle class from Economy to Standard, then save the changes.
steps: Click on the 'My Trips' or 'Rides' link in the main navigation to open your trips list.
In the trips view, select the 'Upcoming' tab to show future rides.
From the upcoming rides list, locate and click on the airport ride scheduled for 9:00 AM (or the soonest airport ride if times are listed).
On the ride details page, click the 'Modify' or 'Edit Booking' button.
In the time field, change the pickup time from '09:00 AM' to '08:45 AM'.
In the vehicle type section, change the selection from 'Economy' to 'Standard'.
Click the 'Save Changes' or 'Update Ride' button to apply the new time and vehicle class.

tasks.name: Cancel the soonest upcoming ride and choose wallet credit as the refund method
tasks.description: Go to the list of upcoming rides, select the soonest one, cancel it, select a cancellation reason, and choose to receive any refund as wallet credit rather than other refund methods.
steps: Use the header navigation to go to the 'My Trips' or 'Rides' section.
Click on the 'Upcoming' tab to display all future rides.
Identify and click on the ride with the earliest upcoming pickup time in the list.
On the ride details page, click the 'Cancel Ride' button.
In the cancellation reason list, select a reason such as 'Change of plans'.
In the refund options section, choose 'Wallet credit' as the refund method instead of any other available methods.
Click the 'Confirm Cancellation' button to finalize the cancellation with wallet credit.

tasks.name: Contact support about an overcharged fare on the most recent completed trip
tasks.description: Access the help section, select the latest completed trip, choose a billing issue, describe the overcharge (charged $25 instead of shown $18), and submit the issue via in-site chat or message form.
steps: From the main navigation or footer, click on 'Help & Support' or 'Support'.
In the help section, select the option related to 'Past trips' or 'Trip issues'.
When prompted to choose a trip, select the most recent completed trip from the list.
From the list of issue types, click on 'Billing issue' or 'Fare problem'.
Within the billing options, choose 'Fare higher than expected' as the specific issue.
In the message or description text box, type a short explanation: 'The app showed an estimated fare of $18, but I was charged $25.'
Choose 'In-app chat' or 'Message support' as the contact method if multiple options are provided.
Click the 'Submit', 'Start Chat', or equivalent button to send the billing issue to support.
